text:
On Thu, Sep 07, 2000 at 07:17:57PM -0700, Bill Fenner wrote:
> 
> Won't just changing the ports to use MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=non-gnu/.* be easier?

Oops.. missed this variable :)

Unfortunately, I'm a bit bandwidth-challenged ATM, so I cannot really
check if this would fetch "non-GNU" ports properly.  I'll test later
today, and try to make a list of ports that need changing.

Thanks for the subdir pointer!  Guess I'll move within reach of the
pointy hat :)

G'luck,
Peter
